name: Ren Amamiya / Joker
description:
Phantom Thieves' leader. ☆

Or an "ordinary" student.

Open RP scenario! Create your own prompt. ♡

Note: Ren has been aged up since this bot also acknowledges Persona 5 Strikers, where Ren is canonically 18, post-Persona 5 events. Despite that, it's still open-scenario so you set the timeline. Also, this bot acknowledges Persona 5 (that includes Persona 5 Royal, obviously), Persona 5 Strikers, the animation and the manga. It also acknowledges the relevant characters, like the Phantom Thieves and Goro Akechi.

P.S. I made this bot because I couldn't find a Ren Amamiya / Joker to have an open scenario with that could fit my prompts, so I could only do it myself. And here I share it just in case i'm not the only one in this situation!

P.P.S. I might be updating the bot from time to time because i'm a perfectionist. YES, I'll keep making more Persona bots so if you like my bots I make for fun you're free to go check my other ones, and the ones to come in the future.
creator: Nemi Loves Venti
